name: Record: Depth Recurrence + SGD TTT + Parallel Muon
author: naazimsnh02
blurb: Depth Recurrence (layers 4,5) for 13 virtual layers from 11 physical at zero parameter cost + legal score-first SGD TTT (3ep, all blocks unfrozen) + SDPA fallback. Built on PR #549 stack (LeakyReLU(0.5)², BigramHash(2048), XSA4, Partial RoPE, LN Scale, VE128, EMA+SWA, Parameter Banking + Parallel Muon, int6 GPTQ-lite + lzma).
